name: linMeasHeaderBaudrate
title: linMeasHeaderBaudrate
description: With this function it is possible to set request to measure the baud rate value for next LIN header event. Channel, where the baud rate is measured, is determined by the CAPL program context.

This function only initiates the baud rate measurement. The result becomes available when the next LIN header occurs and it remains valid until next measurement request. To retrieve the result the function linGetMeasBaudrate() shall be used.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: This parameter specifies a field of LIN header which will be used for baud rate measurement. 0: Synch field 1: Identifier field

return: On successful request returns zero, otherwise -1.

description: Test case for measuring baud rate using LIN header event

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
